name: @mindfiredigital/ignix-lite-engine
description: Core rules engine, validator, theming, and preview rendering for Ignix-Lite

scripts.build: tsup && copyfiles -u 2 src/manifests/*.json dist/manifests && copyfiles -f ../../api-full.txt dist && pnpm build:index
scripts.dev: tsup --watch --onSuccess "copyfiles -u 2 src/manifests/*.json dist/manifests && copyfiles -f ../../api-full.txt dist && pnpm build:index"
